MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF CALIFORNIA DRYWALL/LATHING INDUSTRY LABOR-MANAGEMENT COOPERATION COMMITTEE, INC., FOR AND ON BEHALF OF THE CARPENTERS FUNDS ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUED THE MATTER FROM OCT-25-2007 TO NOV-08-2007, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AMENDED NOTICE FILED 10/01/07. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761
LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Continued To Nov-08-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD on behalf of itself and on behalf of CALIFORNIA DRYWALL/LATHING INDUSTRY LABOR-MANAGEMENT COOPERATION COMMITTEE, INC., for and on behalf of the CARPENTERS FUNDS ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 11/08/07 per amended notice filed 10/01/07. (302/JKS) JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR #4761
